text.title: aws-cli-compute Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for aws-cli-compute as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using root account credentials in ~/.aws/credentials for day-to-day operations.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Root credentials cannot be scoped with IAM policies; a compromised key has full account access. Use IAM roles or least-privilege users.

failure-mode.description: Hardcoding AWS credentials in shell scripts or code files.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Credentials leak into version control or logs. Use environment variables, IAM roles, or AWS Secrets Manager.
